Class ClientDAO

java.lang.Object
dataAccess.AbstractDAO<Client>
dataAccess.ClientDAO
public class ClientDAO extends AbstractDAO<Client>
DAO class for managing Client records and their associated Address records.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class dataAccess.AbstractDAO

    LOGGER

    Description

    Deletes a Client from the database by their ID.

    Retrieves all Clients along with their Addresses from the database.

    Retrieves a Client along with their Address from the database by client ID.

    Updates an existing Client in the database.

    Updates the Address of a Client by address ID.

    Updates a Client's details including telephone, email, and optionally address.

  • Method Details

    • insertClient

      public void insertClient(Client client) throws SQLException
      Inserts a new Client into the database.
      Parameters:
      client - The Client object to insert.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs.

    • deleteClient

      public void deleteClient(int clientId) throws SQLException
      Deletes a Client from the database by their ID.
      Parameters:
      clientId - The ID of the Client to delete.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs.

    • getClientById

      public Client getClientById(int clientId) throws SQLException
      Retrieves a Client along with their Address from the database by client ID.
      Parameters:
      clientId - The ID of the Client.
      Returns:
      The Client object with the specified ID, or null if not found.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs.

    • getAllClients

      public List<Client> getAllClients() throws SQLException
      Retrieves all Clients along with their Addresses from the database.
      Returns:
      A list of all Clients.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs.

    • update

      public void update(Client client)
      Updates an existing Client in the database.
      Overrides:
      update in class AbstractDAO<Client>
      Parameters:
      client - The Client object with updated data.

    • updateTelephoneOrEmail

      public void updateTelephoneOrEmail(int clientId, String newTelephone, String newEmail) throws SQLException
      Updates only the telephone and/or email of a Client.
      Parameters:
      clientId - The ID of the Client to update.
      newTelephone - The new telephone number (nullable).
      newEmail - The new email (nullable).
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs.

    • updateClientWithAddress

      public boolean updateClientWithAddress(Client client) throws SQLException
      Updates both a Client and their associated Address in a single transaction. Inserts the Address if it's new.
      Parameters:
      client - The Client with updated Address.
      Returns:
      true if the update succeeded, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs.

    • updateAddress

      public void updateAddress(int clientId, Address newAddress) throws SQLException
      Updates the Address of a Client by address ID.
      Parameters:
      clientId - The ID of the Client.
      newAddress - The new Address.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs.

    • updateClientDetails

      public void updateClientDetails(int clientId, String newTelephone, String newEmail, Address newAddress) throws SQLException
      Updates a Client's details including telephone, email, and optionally address.
      Parameters:
      clientId - The ID of the Client.
      newTelephone - The new telephone (nullable).
      newEmail - The new email (nullable).
      newAddress - The new Address (nullable).
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs.
